name: HashiChain

surfaces.name: HashiChain protocol specification README
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth Markdown overview of SN115's Probabilistic State Machine architecture, Yuma Consensus integration, and Proof of Entanglement design, published in the official hashichain source repository README. Served as a static raw file for machine-readable ingestion of the subnet protocol write-up.
